name: claude-code-schema
description: Generate and publish versioned Claude Code configuration schemas from first-party evidence

scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --check-coverage --lines 85 --functions 85 --branches 75 --statements 85 node --test dist/test/*.test.js
scripts.schema:generate: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js generate
scripts.schema:validate: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js validate
scripts.schema:diff: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js diff
scripts.schema:discover: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js discover
scripts.schema:release-notes: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js release-notes
scripts.schema:stage: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli.js stage
